name: Almond Poppy Seed Bread
recipeInstructions:
Mix all batter ingredients in a large bowl. Pour batter into 2 well greased and floured loaf pans. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour. Let cool 5 minutes.
Blend orange glaze ingredients. Pour over loaves while still warm in pans. Cool 5 minutes, then remove loaves from pans.
